nodes.name: Naruto Uzumaki
nodes.bio: A hyperactive ninja who hosts the Nine-Tails Fox, driven by his dream to become Hokage and earn recognition.

nodes.name: Monkey D. Luffy
nodes.bio: A rubber-powered pirate captain with an unshakable dream of becoming King of the Pirates.

nodes.name: Gon Freecss
nodes.bio: An optimistic boy with extraordinary potential, hunting for his absent father while becoming a licensed Hunter.

nodes.name: Eren Yeager
nodes.bio: A soldier who can transform into a Titan. His burning hatred of Titans eventually drives him toward an apocalyptic plan.

nodes.name: Light Yagami
nodes.bio: A genius student who acquires a supernatural notebook that kills anyone whose name is written in it, becoming Kira.

nodes.name: Edward Elric
nodes.bio: A young alchemist who sacrificed his limbs attempting to resurrect his mother, now searching for the Philosopher's Stone.

nodes.name: Killua Zoldyck
nodes.bio: Born into a family of assassins, Killua befriends Gon and uses his unique Nen ability of electricity-based attacks.

nodes.name: Spike Spiegel
nodes.bio: A bounty hunter drifting through space with a haunted past, a calm demeanor, and lethal martial arts skills.
